nasb.text: and whoever would not seek the Lord God of Israel should be put to death, whether small or great, man or woman.

esv.text: but that whoever would not seek the Lord, the God of Israel, should be put to death, whether young or old, man or woman.

cnv.text: 不尋求耶和華以色列的　神的，無論男女老幼，都必處死。

ccb.text: 凡不寻求以色列的上帝耶和华的，无论男女老幼，一律处死。
